title: Minimal Guardian Beam
description: Clean and minimal guardian beams, Keep attack cues without the clutter
body:
🌊 **Minimal Guardian Beam, Sleek Underwater Combat!** ⚡✨  
Tired of messy guardian beams cluttering your screen? Minimal Guardian Beam trims the Guardian and Elder Guardian attack visuals down to **just two glowing lines**, keeping your focus sharp while still letting you know you are under attack. Combat looks cleaner, fights feel smoother, and underwater adventures are easier on the eyes.  

Whether you are exploring ocean monuments, farming guardians, or battling underwater mobs, this pack makes gameplay **clearer, sleeker, and more enjoyable**.  

🔹 **Features:**  
💠 Only two thin vertical beam lines, minimal but visible  
💠 Maintains attack cues for gameplay clarity  
💠 Subtle glow effect for stylish simplicity  
💠 Dark background for better contrast  
💠 Lightweight and compatible with most packs  
💠 Perfect for guardian farms, PvE combat, or casual exploration  

⚡ Dive in, fight smart, and enjoy **a cleaner, distraction-free Minecraft experience**!
